name: STRYKER CORP
summary: Stryker Corporation is a global medical technology company offering innovative products in MedSurg, Neurotechnology, and Orthopaedics. Key products include surgical equipment, endoscopic systems, patient handling equipment, Mako robotic-arm assisted technology, joint replacement implants, neurovascular devices, and AI-assisted virtual care platforms. Products are sold in approximately 61 countries, serving doctors, hospitals, and healthcare facilities, impacting more than 150 million patients annually.
